Class RaceCarManager

java.lang.Object
RaceCarManager
Direct Known Subclasses:
RaceCarDBManager
public class RaceCarManager extends Object
This parent class provides validation logic for RaceCarDBManager class. Its primary role is to ensure proper creation of data as well as modification to data.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RaceCarManager()
    Initializes a new empty array list which holds race car objects.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • RaceCarManager

      public RaceCarManager()
      Initializes a new empty array list which holds race car objects.

  • Method Details

    • getRaceCars

      public ArrayList<RaceCar> getRaceCars()
      This method gets the array list of cars.
      Returns:
      the array list of car objects

    • setRaceCars

      public void setRaceCars(ArrayList<RaceCar> raceCars)
      This method sets the value of raceCars to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      raceCars - an array of race car objects

    • idFound

      public RaceCar idFound(int id)
      This method was used to check if an id was found in an array list of race car objects.
      Parameters:
      id - the id to be found
      Returns:
      RaceCar if the id is found, the raceCar object is returned

    • stringValid

      public boolean stringValid(String inputString)
      This method checks if string input is valid. It checks if there is empty input or full of spaces.
      Parameters:
      inputString - the string to be checked
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if the string input is valid

    • yearValid

      public boolean yearValid(int year)
      This method checks if year input is valid. It checks if the year is in the range of 2000-2026
      Parameters:
      year - the year to be checked
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if the year input is valid

    • topSpeedValid

      public boolean topSpeedValid(double topSpeed)
      This method checks if the top speed input is valid. It checks if the user is using one decimal place or if the speed is positive.
      Parameters:
      topSpeed - the top speed input to be checked
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if the top speed input is valid

    • launchValid

      public boolean launchValid(int launchStatus)
      This method checks if the launch status is valid. It checks if it has a value of 0 or 1.
      Parameters:
      launchStatus - the launch status input to be checked
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if the launch status input is valid

    • raceValid

      public boolean raceValid(RaceCar raceCar1, RaceCar raceCar2)
      This method checks if the conditions of the race are valid. It checks if the car objects are not null, if the cars racing are two separate cars, and if either car has been launched already.
      Parameters:
      raceCar1 - the first race car to be checked
      raceCar2 - the second race car to be checked
      Returns:
      boolean true or false to determine if the race conditions have been met
